---
title: "Zotero"
pagetitle: "Zotero"
date: "2025-01-04"
date-title: "Date Added"
author: "Austin Thompson"
author-title: "Contributor"
short-description: "Zotero is a free and open-source reference management software to manage bibliographic data and related research materials, such as PDF files."
resource-link: "https://www.zotero.org/"
categories:
 - OS Tools
 - For Scientists
 - Free
editor: source
---

----
## About this Resource
{{< meta short-description >}}
\

[Visit Resource]({{< meta resource-link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}
